title: Fix wrong runtime result from missing logic when use `-fno-gate`

features.name: ternary operator assigned to type()-derived variable
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator whose result is assigned to a variable declared with var type(...) where the type is derived from another signal using the type() operator

features.name: type() operator for type derivation
features.description: Code should include the type() operator used to derive a variable's type from an existing signal in a var declaration
